svg.text: Input sequence: 60 daily sales values → predict day 61

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does Min-Max normalisation do in the LSTM pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What do the 64 LSTM units do?')
sendPrompt('Why is dropout used after the LSTM layer?')
sendPrompt('What does the Dense output layer produce?')
sendPrompt('How is the predicted sales value converted back to Naira?')
